name: Pasta with Roasted Eggplant and Tomato Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 450°F.
2. Prick the eggplant with a fork, place it on a baking sheet, and roast for about 45 minutes, turning occasionally, until the eggplant is tender but not falling apart.
3. When cool enough to handle, peel and dice the eggplant pulp. Place in a colander and discard the skin. Drain any bitter juices.
4. Cook the pasta according to package instructions.
5. Warm the tomato sauce in a large sauté pan.
6. Add the diced eggplant and remaining ingredients to the sauce, and warm through.
7. Season to taste; toss the cooked pasta with the sauce before serving.
